app.name: Auditor
locale.label: Interface language
readiness.checking.title: Checking local services
readiness.checking.detail: Looking for the API and configured local models.
readiness.ready.title: Local services ready
readiness.ready.detail: The private local workspace can accept an audit.
readiness.setup.title: Local setup needs attention
readiness.setup.detail: The API is connected, but one or more required services are not ready.
readiness.modelMissing.title: Local model is missing
readiness.modelMissing.detail: Install the configured instruction model, then retry the readiness check.
readiness.modelLoading.title: Local model is loading
readiness.modelLoading.detail: Keep this page open. Auditing will become available when the model is ready.
readiness.disconnected.title: Local API is disconnected
readiness.disconnected.detail: Start the local API, then retry the connection. Your text stays in this browser.
workspace.title: Review the claim, then trace the reason.
workspace.intro: Paste English or Slovak writing here. The auditor identifies writing and verification risks—it does not determine scientific truth.
editor.label: Text to audit
editor.placeholder: Paste or write the text you want to review…
editor.help: Plain text stays in your local workspace. Formatting is simplified for a stable audit copy.
editor.language.label: Text language
editor.empty: Add text before starting an audit.
editor.overLimit.one: Shorten the text by {count} character to continue.
editor.overLimit.other: Shorten the text by {count} characters to continue.
review.title: Claim review
review.empty.title: No claim selected
review.empty.detail: Run an audit, then select a highlighted claim to connect its exact span to the explanation here.
audit.available: The immutable audit copy will be processed in your local workspace.
audit.servicesUnavailable: Start the required local services before auditing this text.
audit.pending.title: Reviewing the text locally
audit.pending.detail: The configured local model is extracting and checking claims. This can take a few minutes on CPU.
audit.complete.title: Audit complete
audit.complete.detail: The immutable audit contains {count} claims. Select a highlighted claim to inspect its review.
audit.partial.title: Usable results with a partial failure
audit.partial.detail: The audit preserved {count} claims and completed deterministic work. Retry to rerun the model-assisted stages.
audit.failed.title: The audit could not finish
audit.failed.detail: No low-risk result was inferred. Check local services and retry the audit.
audit.timeout.title: The local model timed out
audit.timeout.detail: The failed attempt was recorded without treating it as low risk. Retry when the model is ready.
audit.modelMissing.title: The configured model is not installed
audit.modelMissing.detail: Run the displayed Ollama setup command, retry the connection, then audit again.
audit.check.detail: Check the existing immutable attempt without starting a duplicate.
audit.retry.detail: Retry creates a new immutable attempt unless the browser is recovering an interrupted request.
audit.reaudit.detail: Re-auditing creates a new immutable run linked to this audit.
claim.navigation.label: Claim navigation
claim.highlight.label: {status} claim. Review: {text}
claim.overlap.title: {count} overlapping claims
claim.stale.editor: The text has changed since this audit. Highlights are stale until you re-audit.
claim.stale.title: This review is stale
claim.stale.detail: The audited text has changed. Re-audit before applying a saved suggestion.
claim.findings.empty: No writing findings were recorded for this claim.
claim.finding.default: This finding contributed to the claim review.
claim.suggestion.empty: No safe revision was generated for this claim.
claim.suggestion.applied: Suggestion applied. Re-audit the edited text to refresh the review.
claim.suggestion.stale: The suggestion was not applied because the audited span changed.
claim.finding.explanation.numericalIncon: A quantity conflicts with another explicit quantity in this text.
claim.finding.explanation.causalOverstat: The wording presents a causal relationship more strongly than the text can establish.
claim.finding.explanation.certaintyOvers: The wording presents the claim with more certainty than is warranted.
claim.finding.explanation.comparativeAmb: The comparison does not clearly identify its baseline or scope.
claim.finding.explanation.scopeAmbiguity: The population, setting, or boundary of the claim is unclear.
